# Need starting business before APEX route

> BOSS Libraries public routing record. Use it to find the right source, link, organization, or person.

## Description

## User intent The user wants government contracts but has not legally formed or is idea-stage. ## Best primary route

## When to surface

The user wants government contracts but has not legally formed or is idea-stage.

## Key information

- ## User intent
- The user wants government contracts but has not legally formed or is idea-stage.
- ## Best primary route
- Do not route primarily to APEX yet. Route to SBDC for startup advising and SCORE for mentoring; return to APEX after formation and readiness.
- ## Ask first
- Have you legally formed the business yet?
- What ZIP/county will the business operate from?

## People and links

- Organizations: SCORE, Small Business Development Center (SBDC), APEX Accelerator
- Link: <https://www.sbdc.uh.edu/sbdc/Start_Your_Business.asp>

## Next handoff

Do not route primarily to APEX yet. Route to SBDC for startup advising and SCORE for mentoring; return to APEX after formation and readiness.

## Guardrails

- The BOSS Libraries Librarian retrieves and routes information; it is not a mentor or a substitute for a qualified professional.
- Do not make final legal, tax, accounting, lending, certification, procurement, or compliance decisions for the user.
- Verify live pages for current eligibility, deadlines, contacts, prices, and program rules before presenting them as current.
